case_title: CROSS PARK CORPORATION VS. BAR AGRICOLE LLC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CROSS PARK CORPORATION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CROSS PARK CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAR AGRICOLE LLC. WILLAUSCH, ANDREAS $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,120.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-20-2015 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE:45.00) SERVED MAY-28-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BAR AGRICOLE LLC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-20-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-20-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY ABEY FASSIL--MANAGER/ OWNER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CROSS PARK CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT BAR AGRICOLE LLC. WILLAUSCH, ANDREAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-13-2015 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF CROSS PARK CORPORATION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 25.00 SERVED MAY-28-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WILLAUSCH, ANDREAS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-13-2015 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JUL-20-2015 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
